MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather Sager, Esq. 415-749-9510 of Vedder Price for Moving party.
Andrew Scher, Esq. 415-788-4545 specially appearing for Defendant Keller.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

THE LAW OFFICE OF VEDDER PRICE (CA). LLP AND ATTY. HEATHER M. SAGER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted without Prejudice to Mr. Keller seeking a further continuance. In addition, the trial is continued to May 13, 2019 per stipulation of the parties. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Moving party to prepare a proposed order on the mandatory judicial council form and an order continuing trial.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Scheer, Esq. 415-788-4545 Specially Appearing for Defendant Keller.
Heather Sager, Esq. 415-749-9510 of Vedder Price for Defendant Steep Hill.

RULING - A R G U E D. Both sides Argue. A trial continuance is discussed. The matter is passed for Parties to get in touch with Plaintiff's Counsel re: a standstill agreement, discovery and a possible trial continuance.

THE LAW OFFICE OF VEDDER PRICE AND ATTY. HEATHER M. SAGER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Continued to 12/3/18. The matter is stayed until the next hearing date. Defendant's Counsel to inform Plaintiff's Counsel re: today's rulings and to try and work out a proposed stipulated order re: a schedule. Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
